name: Velammal Vidhyashram - Padur

address.Address: Apartment, Bella Tuscany XS Real,Rajiv Gandhi Salai, OMR, next to XS Real Bella Tuscany, Padur, Tamil Nadu 603103

address.streetAddress: Apartment, Bella Tuscany XS Real,Rajiv Gandhi Salai, OMR, next to XS Real Bella Tuscany, Padur, Tamil Nadu 603103

itemListElement.reviewBody:
My son has been studying in this school from LKG to 4th standard, but he is still not able to read even a single word properly. Now he is in 4th standard, and the academic year is almost over.
Students spend around 8 hours in school every day, but my son's classwork notes and workbooks are mostly empty. It clearly shows that the work is not being properly done or monitored in school.
Instead, the school sends a bulk amount of PDF worksheets and expects parents to complete the entire portion during the weekend, which is very difficult and unrealistic.
The school mainly promotes students who are already performing well in their advertisements, but there seems to be very little attention given to slow learners who actually need guidance and support. As a parent, I feel disappointed because despite studying here for many years, my child has not received the support needed to improve.

The principal’s behavior is extremely unprofessional and dismissive towards both parents and students. Concerns are not heard with patience, and instead of support, responses often feel rude and arrogant. This sets a very poor example for the children.The principal does not create a welcoming or approachable environment. Parents who raise genuine issues about academics or student well-being are often brushed aside. The lack of empathy and transparency from the administration is very disappointing.The school leadership focuses more on maintaining an image than addressing real concerns. The principal’s behavior is authoritative rather than collaborative, and the administrative team reflects the same attitude. This culture makes the school feel hostile instead of nurturing.The administration staff’s attitude is careless and uncooperative. Even for simple queries, parents are made to wait unnecessarily, and responses are often curt. A school of this level should ensure better communication and respect in dealing with parents. Administration staff here need training in basic courtesy and professionalism. Their tone and approach come across as indifferent and sometimes even rude. It feels like parents are seen as a burden rather than partners in education.

Worst school management.... No discipline....
Not good security.... yesterday my son(I will not mention the name) came home from school saying someone broke his cycle and when i checked it.. the whole gear mechanism  was broken... the mechanic told it would cost 4k to repair it... will the school pay the compensation no right then why are they letting someone break cycles... I hope someone will look into this... very disappointed.
Absolutely horrendous, they shamelessly asks us to pay the fees and don’t care about anything else about student’s rights and the maintenance of the structure

My daughter is studying JKG in padur Velammal School where she started this academic year.
At home, she is very active and vivacious, she has started singing many rhymes at home and it is notable that she does her homework regularly and honestly.   We are grateful to the teachers and administration for bringing positive energy into our daughter's life.  As a parent, I am very impressed with the overall atmosphere of the school.   The staff are always approachable and genuinely care about the well being of the students and the teachers are very supportive and communicate regularly with parents which gives me more education.
thank you

It's going good.
Transport need to be improve.

My child is studying in srkg.Iam very much surprised to see my child explaining each and every consept in such an excellent way.Thank you so much Gayathri mam who did an amazing job.Special thanks to the management.well done 👍

Recently skill Expo program was conducted which was absolutely great.. Teachers have put so much effort for the kids learning ..  way of approach with parents also was good.. Teacher is always being so kind to kids which makes them comfortable and enjoying their learning with them.

1. Amazing to see my child's growth and confidence.
2. Well-organized event, impressed by the variety of activities.
3. Great opportunity to enhance learning through theme based learning.
4. Event helped assess students learning outcomes.
5. Special thanks to her Class teacher **( Mrs. Raja Rajeshwari )** for entire support & taking care of child.
6. Thanks for all support staff for arranging such theme based learning program/skill expo in school VVPD.

Thanking 😊
Truptimayee Pani.
Raghunath Dash

I give only one star.
Academics very poor. Computer Science teacher is not available in this branch. But they are conduct practical exam for students. In this branch only reduce the portions. Other branches conduct the all portions for the exam.
Vellammal Vidhyashram is a good School.  But in this padur branch is really very very worst...
